pi_items.metadata_value: Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.
pi_items.verified_value: Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.
pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and verifier.py programmatic check
Presence of documents/SRS.json in the ExampleProject data directory and task instructions
setup_task.sh calling setup_task_project with argument 'add_comment', resulting in 'add_comment_project' per task_utils.sh logic

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic ReqView Example Project. The target document is 'SRS', confirmed by the presence of 'documents/SRS.json'. The project is loaded from a uniquely created directory named 'add_comment_project'. The expected outcome is the addition of the exact comment 'Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.' to a requirement's Discussion panel, which the verifier subsequently checks within the project's modified JSON files.
